headline: The Friday Checkout: Amazon says it’s the second-largest U.S. grocer — stores (mostly) not required
summary: The company’s grocery business brought in over $150 billion in gross sales last year, yet its brick-and-mortar presence relies mostly on its specialty chain, Whole Foods.

headline: Harris Teeter Offers GLP-1 Medications, Nutrition Support and Cost-Saving Options
summary: Harris Teeter customers can now find expanded GLP-1 offerings and other weight management medications at Harris Teeter Pharmacies across markets, supporting customers with convenient, connected access to pharmacy offerings and nutrition support at a great value.

headline: Kroger Announces Expanded GLP-1 Offerings And Other Weight Management Medications At Harris Teeter Pharmacies
summary: Harris Teeter offers affordable medication options and professional guidance from our pharmacists and registered dietitians. Prescriptions from any provider can be filled at Harris Teeter, where customers have easy
